title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama: browser, Node, Deno & Bun compatible.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM, chat, or embeddings backend.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat UI, model management, RAG, multi-user, dark/light themes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama: sync/async, streaming, POJO mapping, Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: simple DSL for chat, generate, pull, and embed.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST API with ergonomic commands and fzf integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration: use Ollama models for generative QA, chat, and embeddings pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama: supports .NET 6+, streaming, async enumerables.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for Ollama server.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot that combines Ollama LLMs with ChromaDB for private RAG on local files.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that exposes any Ollama model to servers with slash commands.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama: reproducible builds across Linux & macOS with CUDA support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar chat for brainstorming and summarizing notes.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin to chat with your graph using any Ollama model and custom prompt templates.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK module that wraps Ollama for CI pipelines: generate docs, tests, or summaries.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio & streaming support.
